TESTIMONIALS
The ACE Córdoba program was exceptionally well organized 
and provided a rich and inspiring environment for collaboration 
and learning. The agenda offered a perfect balance between 
company visits, networking, and knowledge exchange. 
 I particularly value the diversity of participants and the quality 
of the discussions around innovation and entrepreneurship. 
My suggestion would be to continue fostering follow-up 
mechanisms to strengthen the connections and potential 
collaborations built during the program. Congratulations to 
the entire organizing team for an outstanding event.
Given the significant area we visited, I do not have anything 
but praise for a job well done. Logistics were a challenge - 
but the organizers met them head on with little disruption. 
It was an amazing experience and will forever be a highlight 
in my career. More to come!!
The program was fantastic—truly one of a kind. The agenda 
was ambitious, rich, and incredibly engaging, and I’m 
thrilled we were able to accomplish everything as planned. 
The selection of participants was excellent, with everyone 
committed, engaging, and eager to connect. Those 
connections have remained strong even after the event. As 
my first ACE experience, it set the bar exceptionally high, 
and I sincerely hope it won’t be my last.
It has been an excellent experience over the years, I 
see that it has improved substantially without losing 
the essence of what ace entails, so I must congratulate 
you in every way and encourage you to continue 
developing this extraordinary activity, congratulations 
Enrique
